The '''Quoorian marshsucker''' was a type of creature<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref> [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Quooria system/Legends|Quooria system]]</ref> celestial body [[Quooria]].<ref name="Yesterday Today" /> It was similar to [[Mosquito/Legends|mosquitos]] but was much more [[Death/Legends|deadlier]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

A type of creature related to Quoorian marshsuckers eventually went extinct on Quooria and became preserved in the [[Sap/Legends|sap]] of the celestial body's [[Tree/Legends|trees]]. When an ancient [[Disease/Legends|disease]] resurfaced<ref name="Yesterday Today" /> at some point by [[3637 BBY]],<ref name="Date SoR">{{TORweb|url=community/showthread.php?p=9852711#edit9852711|text=Charles Boyd on Forums: "Dear Story Team, What Year Are We Currently In?" (1)}} — According to ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''{{'s}} lead designer, [[Charles Boyd]], the majority of the events of the digital expansion [[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan|''Shadow of Revan'']] take place in approximately [[3637 BBY]]. The Crew Skill mission "Yesterday Today" is part of the ''Shadow of Revan'' expansion and therefore also takes place around that [[Standard year/Legends|year]].</ref> the preserved creatures potentially held the key to combating the disease.<ref name="Yesterday Today" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Quoorian marshsucker was first mentioned in the [[2003]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]], ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''.<ref name="KOTOR" />
